meta.description: Hubbell PO/WO to Agility job matches. All 733 PDF documents were matched to Agility jobs by address fuzzy-match against hubbell jobs.xlsx.
meta.match_method: Address extracted from PO/WO PDF (SHIP_TO field), fuzzy-matched to Agility job address. match_ratio >= 0.75 accepted as match.
